nl: If P0 holds of x, then P0 holds of the shift of x.
If P1 holds of y, then P1 holds of the lift of y.
If R holds between x and y, then R holds between the shift of x and the lift of y.
formal: forall x:S0 y:S1. R(x, y) -> R(f0(x), f1(y))

nl: If Q0 holds of x, then Q0 holds of the shift of x.
If Q1 holds of y, then Q1 holds of the lift of y.
If R holds between x and y and P0 holds of x and P1 holds of y, then R holds between the shift of x and the lift of y.
formal: forall x:S0 y:S1. R(x, y) & P0(x) & P1(y) -> R(f0(x), f1(y))

nl: If R holds between x and y and Q0 holds of x and Q1 holds of y, then R holds between the shift of x and the lift of y.
formal: forall x:S0 y:S1. R(x, y) & Q0(x) & Q1(y) -> R(f0(x), f1(y))

nl: R holds between mav-0 and ren-0.
visible_step_1: R holds between the shift of mav-0 and the lift of ren-0 and P0 holds of the shift of mav-0 and P1 holds of the lift of ren-0.
